motion.name: route-ease
motion.purpose: Short state changes and tactile button lift.

components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-button-primary { background: oklch(0.58 0.2 357); color: oklch(1 0 0); padding: .75rem 1rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.58 0.2 357); border-radius: .35rem; font: 800 1rem/1.5 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; transition: transform 180ms cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1); } .ds-button-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-button-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid oklch(0.64 0.12 183); outline-offset: 4px; }

components.name: Mode Tab
components.description: Selects the task statement closest to the main uncertainty.
components.css: .ds-mode-tab { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 2.3rem 1fr; min-height: 5rem; align-items: center; width: 100%; padding: 1rem 1.2rem; border: 0; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.83 0.012 252); background: transparent; color: oklch(0.17 0.014 252); text-align: left; font: 780 1rem/1.5 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } .ds-mode-tab[aria-selected='true'] { background: oklch(0.58 0.2 357); color: white; } .ds-mode-tab:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid oklch(0.64 0.12 183); outline-offset: -4px; }

components.name: Capability Control
components.description: Explains one independently authorized delivery level.
components.css: .ds-capability { min-height: 7.5rem; padding: 1rem .65rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.34 0.135 357); background: transparent; color: oklch(0.34 0.135 357); font: 850 1rem/1.4 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } .ds-capability[aria-pressed='true'] { background: oklch(0.34 0.135 357); color: white; } .ds-capability:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid oklch(0.64 0.12 183); outline-offset: 4px; }

narrative.overview: A precise field instrument: curious enough to invite exploration, rigorous enough to support a decision, and transparent about what is or is not known.

rules.name: Committed Signal
rules.body: Rose-red carries identity across purposeful surfaces.

rules.name: Instrument Label
rules.body: Labels identify real controls, states, or evidence.

dos: Provide visible focus and reduced motion.
donts: Do not use repetitive SaaS feature-card grids.
Do not imply deterministic checks are behavioral evidence.
